creator: info@aballesta.es
text:
In very rare circunstancies, I see 2 cores working on my X6, building java/openjdk. Normally only work one. It can be late 10-15 minutes and, solving this, can be transform probably for me to only 2-3, or 6-8 in dual core.

Showing this documentation:
http://hg.openjdk.java.net/build-infra/jdk8/raw-file/tip/README-builds.html
openjdk can be build on multi-thread. Now, I haven't time for check.

Really, I don't know if this is considered a bug.

Regards.
